release_year.quote: Four rice varieties - Ld 376, BG 377, At 378, and BG 381 - have been introduced as high yielding rice varieties.
release_year.review_notes: Release year 2023 from Ministry of Agriculture announcement covering this set of four varieties.

expected_yield_kg_per_acre.quote: Can easily be grown in dry zone and produces 6.5 metric tons of paddy harvest per hectare
